heroHeadline: Army Veteran Godfrey Wade Deported After Hearing He Was Never Notified About
heroSubtitle: Legal experts warn Wade's path back to the US could take years; DHS Shutdown enters Day 51 — Mullin leads DHS; 14 deaths in ICE custody in 2026 including Jose Guadalupe Ramos-Solano at Adelanto (March 25); 17 migrants flown to CECOT despite court TRO on March 31
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
